title: selaginella curtisii
intro: Selaginella curtisii, also known as Spike moss or Spike-leaved Cliff Moss, is a species of evergreen plant in the Selaginellaceae family, which is a type of spore-producing vascular plant often referred to as a 'resurrection plant' due to its ability to revive itself after desiccation. The medicinal properties of Selaginella curtisii include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, Selaginella curtisii is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
